resources.string: When enabled, taps and slider drags trigger linear motor haptic feedback
Location permission is required to read GPS satellite info and network signal data
Phone state permission is required to read SIM and mobile network info
Overlay permission is required to display the floating window
Notification permission is required for the foreground service notification
⚠ GPU is DVFS throttling (frequency < 70% of max)
This device does not expose cycle count data
This device does not expose cycle count data
Please enable GPS in system settings
Note: Android 14+ requires manually granting \"Display over other apps\" permission
Required for GPS and network location info to display positioning status.
Required to display device info floating window over other apps.
Required for mobile network type and operator info.
Tip: Android 14+ requires manually granting "Display over other apps" permission
⚠ GPU is DVFS throttling (freq < 70% of max)
Used to obtain GPS and network location for displaying location status.
Used to display the device info floating window over other apps.
Used to obtain mobile network type and carrier info.
